visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: String Conversion Sum
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the mathematical loop to a string-based approach using `toString()`, `split()`, and `reduce()`.

solution.code: const sumOfDigits = (n) => \n  n.toString().split('').reduce((acc, digit) => acc + Number(digit), 0);
solution.explanation: Converting a number to a string and iterating over its characters is a common but slightly less efficient way to process individual digits in JavaScript compared to mathematical extraction.
